details: The agent correctly retrieved all required information. Title ('Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping') and authorship (joshavant) match known facts. CI checks were accurately counted from returned data: 4 failed, 19 passed, 7 skipped (of 30 returned out of 41 total), with failed checks correctly identified. The agent honestly noted the pagination limitation (30 of 41 returned). The one Greptile bot comment was retrieved and accurately summarized with its 5/5 confidence score. The agent also correctly recovered from initial invalid method name errors by checking the tool schema.
